title: Round 4: Gym Leader
purpose: Recognize the same state as pressure transforms its expression across scenes.

questions.prompt: Gym Leader Scene 1: The key is missing. Donte grabs the room and demands answers. Which expression is visible?
options: Overdeveloped D under Stage 1 mistrust pressure
questions.answer: Overdeveloped D under Stage 1 mistrust pressure
questions.hint: Look for urgency, control, and inability to trust help.

questions.prompt: Gym Leader Scene 2: Donte stops directing and says, 'Forget it. Nobody listens anyway.' What shifted?
questions.hint: The same D state can collapse when agency feels blocked.

questions.prompt: Gym Leader Scene 3: Donte pauses and asks, 'What matters most right now?' Which response is this?
questions.hint: Healthy D keeps direction while restoring regulation.

questions.prompt: Gym Leader Scene 4: Donte assigns roles and lets others carry pieces of the plan. What did recognition create?
questions.hint: The boss is defeated when the player sees the state and chooses the healthier move.
